title: Shareable Board reverting and won't save
excerpt:

posts.author: RachM (Rachel Muir)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am an owner of a number of boards within a workspace. One of the boards does not allow me to change the board type to shareable. The other boards are able to be changed but not this one.
There are 2 owners and we have both tried.
It gives the option to change to either shareable or private - when I select shareable it then gives me the option to invite assigness or don’t invite and whichever option I choose when I click change board to shareable it doesn’t save and just reverts back.
There is no error or anything.
Any ideas on why this would be happening?

posts.author: RachM (Rachel Muir)
posts.cookedHtml: After multiple people looking at this issue the only way to fix the issue was to duplicate the board and delete the original. We coud find no reason on why this board could not be changed to shareable.
